calendar.matters:
Demurrer Of E. Stevenson To Petition For Order Determing Trust Instrument Invalid By F. Jackson.
Off Calendar Jul-12-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determing Trust Instrument Invalid Pursant Pt Pc Sec 17200
Off Calendar Jul-02-2012 Off Calendar

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-24-2010 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Duane Leonard for and with Eddie Stevenson (Petitioner).

Mr. Leonard presented oral argument to support his position. The Court stated that it had concerns about the petition and that it was leaning towards denying it. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

Petition For Order Determining Title To Real Property
Off Calendar Sep-01-2010 Continued To Sep-20-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
